sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS PROFESSIONAL FOOTBALL.  FIND OUT THE OTHER CALLER'S FAVORITE PRO FOOTBALL TEAM AND WHERE IT'S HEADED THIS YEAR.       DO YOU AGREE WITH THE CALLER'S PREDICTION?
turns:
So, what team do you root for in professional football?

번역결과  
안녕하세요!
그러면 프로 축구에서 어떤 팀을 지지합니까?
Ah, that's tough to choose. I guess I don't really have a favorite pro football team, but I enjoy watching games from time to time.
That's understandable. What do you think about the current state of professional football?
Well, I think the game has evolved quite a bit over the years.
Yeah, definitely. Do you follow any particular players or teams closely?
Not really, but I do keep up with some of the big names in the league, like Tom Brady and Patrick Mahomes.
Those guys are definitely legends in the sport. How do you think this season will go for them?
Honestly, I haven't been following sports too much lately.
Oh, that's okay. It can be hard to stay updated on everything happening in the world of sports, especially since there's always something new going on.
Absolutely, it's easy to get lost in all the updates and news coming out every day.
Definitely true. If you had to pick one thing you loved most about football, what would it be?
For me, it's the excitement and energy of the crowd during a live game.
I can imagine how amazing that must be. Have you ever gone to a live football game before?
Yes, I have. It was such an incredible experience – the atmosphere was electric!
Wow, sounds like an unforgettable memory. Thanks for sharing your thoughts on football with me today!

Of course, it was great chatting with you about it!

범주 : 공개
Sure, anytime you want to chat, just give me a ring! Take care!
